river: Large natural flowing body of water.
field: Open area with grass or crops.
hut: Small simple dwelling made of natural materials.
community_building: Structure used for work, trade, education or public services.
tavern: Place to rest, eat and drink, especially for travelers.
town: Medium-sized settlement larger than a village.
city: Large, densely populated settlement with complex infrastructure and administration.
kingdom: Territory ruled by a monarch, encompassing multiple settlements.
